metadata.title: Redirect Mapper Pro — Smart 301 Redirect Mapping Tool
metadata.description: Free open-source tool for website migration redirect mapping. Smart URL matching with confidence scoring, orphan detection, and multi-format export.

landing.heroTitle: Smart Redirect Mapping for Website Migrations
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste your old and new URLs, get intelligent 301 redirect mappings with confidence scores. Export to .htaccess, nginx, Cloudflare, CSV, or JSON.
landing.feature1Desc: Three-signal algorithm combining Levenshtein distance, keyword similarity, and URL structure analysis for accurate redirect mapping.
landing.feature2Desc: Every mapping gets a 0-100 confidence score so you know which redirects to trust and which to review manually.
landing.feature3Desc: Export to Apache .htaccess, nginx conf, Cloudflare bulk CSV, generic CSV, or JSON. Ready for any server setup.
landing.feature4Desc: Instantly identify old URLs without matches and new URLs without sources. No page left behind.
landing.feature5Desc: Built-in URL pattern recognition for WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Framer. Or use custom patterns.
landing.feature6Desc: 100% client-side processing. Your URLs never leave your browser. No server, no tracking, no data collection.
landing.howStep1: Paste or upload your old and new URLs
landing.howStep2: Click Match — the algorithm does the heavy lifting
landing.howStep4: Export redirect rules in your preferred format

app.title: Redirect Mapper
app.orphansDesc: These URLs could not be automatically matched
